== Cycle Significance ==
The Saturn-Neptune synodic cycle combines:
* '''♄ Saturn:''' Structure, discipline, and corrections.
* '''♆ Neptune:''' Illusion, speculation, and emotional sentiment.

When these planets form conjunctions, a new cycle of saturn-neptune themes begins. Oppositions mark the culmination point where these themes reach maximum expression and polarity.

title: Scalar White Light
wikitext:
{| class="infobox" style="width:300px; font-size:90%; border:1px solid #aaa; background:#f9f9f9; margin:0.5em 0 0.5em 1em; padding:0.2em; float:right;"
! colspan="2" style="background:#333; color:#fff;" | '''Scalar White Light'''
|-
| '''Type''' || [[Angel Tech]] weapon / psionic phenomenon
|-
| '''Category''' || Scalar visible light technology
|-
| '''Function''' || Weapon against demonic beings and shadow entities
|-
| '''Related''' || [[Angel Tech]], [[Psi Tech]], Scalar Inducer
|}

'''Scalar White Light''' is a specialized psionic phenomenon within the [[Angel Tech]] domain — concentrated [[Scalar Visible Light]] projected as a weapon against demonic beings, shadow entities, and other dark psionic threats.

== Properties ==
Scalar White Light:
* Operates as a high-order psionic frequency of visible light
* Is particularly effective against spiritual and extradimensional threats
* Can ''quantum lock'' certain neural states when beamed into the retina
* Functions as both a weapon and a purification/healing phenomenon

== Application ==
Scalar White Light is the primary offensive capability of [[Angel Tech]] — the divine psionic sub-domain. It is used:
* As a directed beam weapon against shadow entities and demonic beings
* As area purification — cleansing spaces of dark psionic influence
* As a defensive barrier — entities vulnerable to scalar light cannot cross it
* In conjunction with the '''[[Angel Tech|Scalar Inducer]]''' and '''Power Key''' for amplified effect

== Relationship to Angel Tech ==
[[Angel Tech]] relies strongly on Scalar White Light as its primary weapon system. Angel Tech is a more powerful divine sub-part of [[Psi Tech]] — where standard Psi Tech handles conventional psionic operations, Angel Tech operates at a higher order specifically effective against spiritual threats.

== See Also ==
* [[Angel Tech]] — the technology domain
* [[Psi Tech]] — the broader psionic technology family
* [[Psionic Defenses]] — Angel Tech as a defensive layer

title: Science
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Science}}
'''Science''' in the [[Natra|Natura]] universe encompasses the full spectrum of physical inquiry — from mainstream empirical physics to speculative theoretical frameworks that bridge into [[Magic]] and [[Psionics]]. The scientific framework is organized as a '''five-category progression''' from established to visionary, each category mapping to a different relationship with [[Universal Language]].

== The Five Categories of Physics ==

{| class="wikitable" style="width: 100%;"
! Category !! Domain !! UL Relationship !! Description
|-
| '''[[Classical Physics]]''' || Newtonian mechanics, thermodynamics, optics || UL-unaware || Established physics. Accurate at macro scales. The foundation on which all other categories build.
|-
| '''[[Quantum Physics]]''' || Quantum mechanics, QFT, particle physics || UL-adjacent || Established cutting-edge physics. Descriptions that approach UL structure without recognizing it as such.
|-
| '''[[Declassified Physics]]''' || [[Electrogravitic Propulsion|Electrogravitic systems]], [[Scalar Wave Technology]], advanced EM || UL-touching || Real research formerly classified — technologies that governments had but the public didn't. Bridges the gap between mainstream and speculative.
|-
| '''[[QuasiPhysics]]''' (/s/) || [[Quasi|Quasi]] frameworks — empirical extensions || UL-derived || Empirical speculative physics. Testable hypotheses that extend classical/quantum frameworks using Nether-aligned (passive, receptive) UL structures.
|-
| '''[[QuaziPhysics]]''' (/z/) || [[Quazi|Quazi]] frameworks — theoretical projections || UL-native || Theoretical speculative physics. Mathematical models that exist within Æther-aligned (active, projective) UL structures. Fully UL-native.
|}

This progression is not a hierarchy of validity — all five categories describe real phenomena within the Natura universe. They differ in their ''method of access'' and ''relationship to Universal Language''.

== Quasi vs Quazi: The Phonetic-Metaphysical Distinction ==
{{main|Quasi}}
{{main|Quazi}}

The intentional dual spelling encodes a fundamental duality in the universe:

{| class="wikitable" style="width: 100%;"
! !! '''Quasi''' (/s/ — voiceless) !! '''Quazi''' (/z/ — voiced)
|-
| '''Sound''' || /s/ — voiceless alveolar fricative || /z/ — voiced alveolar fricative
|-
| '''Nature''' || Passive, receptive, inward || Active, projective, outward
|-
| '''Polarity''' || [[Nether]] / Yin || [[Æther]] / Yang
|-
| '''Elements''' || Water + Earth || Fire + Air
|-
| '''Modality''' || Mutable (adaptive) || Cardinal (initiating)
|-
| '''Approach''' || Empirical — test and observe || Speculative — theorize and project
|-
| '''Energy''' || [[Argent Energy]] || [[Spiral Energy]]
|}

This is NOT a typo. The /s/ vs /z/ distinction is phonetic encoding of the '''Nether/Æther duality''' that runs through all [[Cosmic Forces]], [[Magic]], and science in the Natura universe.

=== Quasi Sub-Domains ===
* '''[[QuasiParticles]]''' — Empirically observed anomalous particle behaviors
* '''[[QuasiSpace]]''' — Space-like domains accessible through Nether-aligned physics

=== Quazi Sub-Domains ===
* '''[[QuaziParticles]]''' — Theoretically predicted particles from Æther-aligned models
* '''[[QuaziSpace]]''' — Space-like domains projected from Æther-aligned physics

== The Geometric Universality Theorem ==

From [[Universal Language]] theory:

: '''Theorem:''' ''Any physical law can be expressed as a geometric relation in UL.''

This theorem is the bridge between Science and [[Universal Language]]. Physics is not described ''in'' UL — physics ''is'' UL geometry. The mathematical structures studied by scientists are literal [[Universal Language]] shapes, whether the scientists recognize this or not.

== The Four Classical Forces ==
{{main|Cosmic Forces}}

Science in Natra begins with the same four fundamental forces as real-world physics:

{| class="wikitable"
! Force !! UL Role !! Governs
|-
| '''Gravity''' || Geometric curvature || Mass, attraction, spacetime
|-
| '''Electromagnetism''' || Information carrier || Light, electricity, communication
|-
| '''Strong Nuclear''' || Fundamental binding || Atomic nuclei, matter stability
|-
| '''Weak Nuclear''' || Transformation || Radioactive decay, particle identity
|}

These map to the [[Cosmic Forces|Six Cosmic Forces]] (Core/Void/Order/Chaos/Alpha-Ebb/Omega-Flow) when extended through the [[Elemental Balance System]]. Both the 4-force and 6-force models describe the same reality from different perspectives:
* '''Scientists''' work with the 4-force model (classical/quantum)
* '''Magic practitioners''' work with the 6-force model (cosmological)
* '''UL theorists''' work with the unified geometric model (all forces as UL shapes)

== Psionics as Science ==
{{main|Psionics}}

In the Natura universe, [[Psi Abilities|psionic phenomena]] are scientifically measurable:

* '''Biophoton emissions''' via myelinated axon photonic waveguides — measurable with photomultiplier tubes
* '''EEG/MEG correlation''' with psionic activity — standard neuroimaging detects psi signatures
* '''[[Scalar Wave Technology]]''' — non-Hertzian wave applications enabling psionic amplification
* '''[[PsiSys]]''' — artificial psionic network demonstrating that consciousness follows physical laws

The science of psionics bridges Declassified Physics (real measurement) and QuaziPhysics (theoretical UL consciousness models).

== Key Scientific Institutions ==

* '''[[Earth Alliance]]''' — Coordinates scientific research across the [[Sol]] system during [[Solar Cycle 26]]
* '''[[Starcom HQ]]''' — Advanced physics and [[Fusion Tech]] R&D
* '''[[Holo Deck]]''' — Simulation environment for testing theoretical physics models

== See Also ==

* [[Universal Language]] — The formal system underlying all physics
* [[Cosmic Forces]] — The force framework (classical → cosmic → super cosmic)
* [[Technology]] — Applied science in the Natura universe
* [[Mathematics]] — Mathematical foundations of UL science
* [[Magic]] — The "other path" to the same UL truths
* [[Psionics]] — Consciousness science
* [[Quasi]] / [[Quazi]] — Detailed phonetic-metaphysical framework

[[Category:Science]]
[[Category:Universal Language]]

title: Scientific Foundations of Psionics
wikitext:
= Scientific Foundations of Psionics =

This page collects the peer-reviewed scientific evidence, declassified government documentation, and patented technologies that ground the [[Psionics]] framework in established and emerging science. All citations are from primary peer-reviewed journals, government archives, or patent databases — no secondary encyclopedias.

== Biophotonics: Ultra-Weak Photon Emission ==

All living organisms emit ultra-weak photon emission (UPE), also called biophotons. This is not thermal blackbody radiation — it is chemiluminescence arising from reactive oxygen species (ROS) generated during mitochondrial respiration.<ref name="mould2024">Mould S, Jeynes JCG, Sherlock B, et al. (2024). "Ultra weak photon emission — a brief review." ''Frontiers in Physiology'', 15, 1348915. doi:10.3389/fphys.2024.1348915</ref>

'''Key measurements:'''
* Intensity: 10s to 100s of photons per second per cm² from living tissue
* Spectral range: 200–800 nm (UV through visible to near-IR)
* 10⁹ to 10¹⁶ times weaker than daylight-adapted human vision — requires single-photon counting detectors (PMTs or cooled CCDs)
* Internal cellular biophoton intensity is '''orders of magnitude higher''' than surface measurements<ref name="bokkon2010">Bókkon I, et al. (2010). "Estimation of the number of biophotons involved in the visual perception of a single-object image." ''Journal of Photochemistry and Photobiology B: Biology'', 100(3), 160–166.</ref>

'''Biochemical mechanism:'''
# Mitochondrial respiration generates superoxide (O₂⁻)
# Lipid peroxidation produces electronically excited intermediates
# Excited carbonyl species (C=O*) emit at 350–550 nm
# Singlet oxygen (¹O₂) emits at 634, 703, and 1270 nm

{| class="wikitable"
|+ '''UPE Emission Sources'''
! Wavelength (nm) !! Source Species !! Transition
|-
| 350–550 || Excited carbonyl (C=O*) || n→π* relaxation
|-
| 480–520 || Riboflavin/FAD || Flavin fluorescence
|-
| 634, 703 || Singlet oxygen (¹O₂) || ¹Δg → ³Σg⁻
|-
| 1270 || Singlet oxygen (¹O₂) || ¹Δg → ³Σg⁻ (strongest band)
|}

'''Relevance to Psionics:''' Biophoton emission is the first empirically measurable component of the [[Psi Energy Density Scalar Field|Ψ energy density field]]. Surface-measured UPE (~10⁻¹⁹ J/m³) represents only the radiative decay channel of the total T⁰⁰ energy density.

== Brain Biophoton Emission ==

Direct measurement of biophoton emission from the human brain has been achieved:

'''Dotta, Saroka & Persinger (2012):'''<ref name="dotta2012">Dotta BT, Saroka KS, Persinger MA (2012). "Increased photon emission from the head while imagining light in the dark is correlated with changes in electroencephalographic power." ''Neuroscience Letters'', 513(2), 151–154. PMID: 22343311</ref>
* Subjects in a completely dark Faraday cage with PMT positioned at the head
* UPE during visual imagery: ~5×10⁻¹¹ W/m² from right hemisphere
* '''Correlation between UPE and EEG spectral power: r = 0.95 (p < 0.001)'''
* Energy density at surface: ~1.7×10⁻¹⁹ J/m³ (photonic component only)

'''Tang & Dai (2014):'''<ref name="tangdai2014">Tang R, Dai J (2014). "Biophoton signal transmission and processing in the brain." ''Journal of Photochemistry and Photobiology B: Biology'', 139, 71–75.</ref>
* Detected biophoton emission from rat hippocampal slices (in vitro)
* UPE '''increases''' with K⁺ and Ca²⁺ depolarization (stimulating neural activity)
* UPE '''decreases''' with tetrodotoxin (Na⁺ channel blocker, suppressing neural activity)
* '''Pharmacological proof of causation:''' neural firing directly causes biophoton emission

The r = 0.95 correlation is one of the strongest in neuroscience, demonstrating that biophoton emission is directly and quantitatively coupled to neural electrical activity.

== Microtubule Quantum Biology ==

Microtubules are protein polymers forming the structural and computational substrate of the neuronal cytoskeleton. Each microtubule contains a high-density lattice of aromatic chromophores (8 tryptophan residues per tubulin dimer, spaced ~1.5–2.0 nm apart — within FRET distance).<ref name="craddock2014">Craddock TJA, et al. (2014). Aromatic amino acid network in microtubules. Referenced in Mould et al. (2024).</ref>

=== Superradiance in Microtubules ===

Celardo et al. (2019) demonstrated that '''superradiant excitonic states exist''' in the microtubule lattice — cooperative quantum emission (Dicke-type) where N coherent emitters produce intensity proportional to N², not N.<ref name="celardo2019">Celardo GL, Angeli M, Craddock TJA, Bhatt P (2019). "On the existence of superradiant excitonic states in microtubules." ''New Journal of Physics'', 21(2), 023005.</ref>

* The helical tubulin geometry creates conditions for cooperative quantum emission
* States can persist at physiological temperature (310 K)
* This is the '''physical basis''' for the N² amplification claimed on the [[Collective Consciousness]] page

=== Anaesthetic Disruption ===

Electronic energy migration through the microtubule aromatic network is disrupted by anaesthetics, and the degree of disruption '''correlates with anaesthetic clinical potency''':<ref name="kalra2023">Kalra AP, et al. (2023). "Electronic energy migration in microtubules." ''ACS Central Science'', 9(3), 352–361.</ref><ref name="craddock2017">Craddock TJA, et al. (2017). "Anesthetic alterations of collective terahertz oscillations in tubulin correlate with clinical potency." ''Scientific Reports'', 7, 9877.</ref>

* Published in ''ACS Central Science'' (IF ~18) — top-tier chemistry journal
* Correlation holds across diverse anaesthetic molecules (volatiles, intravenous agents)
* '''Implication:''' If anaesthetics cause unconsciousness by disrupting microtubule energy migration, then microtubule energy dynamics are necessary for consciousness

== Neural Optical Communication ==

Myelinated axons function as '''photonic waveguides''' — the myelin sheath (refractive index ~1.44) surrounding the axon core (RI ~1.38) creates a step-index optical fibre geometry capable of guiding biophotons:<ref name="zarkeshian2018">Zarkeshian P, et al. (2018). "Are there optical communication channels in the brain?" ''Frontiers in Bioscience'' (Landmark Ed), 23, 1407–1421. PMID: 29293442</ref>

* Supports guided modes for biophoton-range wavelengths (UV–visible)
* Transmission speed: ~10⁶× faster than electrical signal propagation
* Provides physical mechanism for [[Psi Flow]] — information/energy flowing through neural optical channels

Zarkeshian et al. (2022) extended this model to propose that biophotons could carry error signals for '''backpropagation-based learning''' in biological neural networks, potentially resolving a longstanding neuroscience mystery.<ref name="zarkeshian2022">Zarkeshian P, et al. (2022). "Photons guided by axons may enable backpropagation-based learning algorithms in the brain." ''Scientific Reports''.</ref>

== Cell-to-Cell Optical Communication ==

Non-chemical communication between cells has been demonstrated through UV-transparent barriers:

* '''Kaznacheev (1980):''' Dying cells induce pathological changes in healthy cells through quartz (UV-transparent) but not glass (UV-opaque) barriers — eliminating chemical signalling<ref name="kaznacheev1980">Kaznacheev VP, et al. (1980). UV optical communication experiments through quartz barriers showing mirror cytopathic effect.</ref>
* '''Farhadi (2007):''' Independent replication in intestinal epithelial cells<ref name="farhadi2007">Farhadi A, et al. (2007). Optical communication between intestinal epithelial cells through quartz barriers.</ref>
* '''Chaban (2013):''' Demonstrated specifically between '''neurons and glia'''<ref name="chaban2013">Chaban VV, et al. (2013). Optical communication between neuronal and glial cells.</ref>

This provides empirical evidence for inter-organism photonic communication — a physical substrate for the [[Collective Consciousness]] framework.

== Biomagnetism & SQUID Magnetometry ==

Brain magnetic fields are routinely measured using superconducting quantum interference devices (SQUIDs):

'''Roth (2023):'''<ref name="roth2023">Roth BJ (2023). "Biomagnetism: The First Sixty Years." ''Sensors'', 23(9), 4218. PMID: 37177427</ref>
* Brain magnetic fields: ~100 fT measured by MEG (magnetoencephalography)
* Cardiac fields: ~50 pT (much stronger)
* Biomagnetic energy density: B²/2μ₀ ≈ (10⁻¹³)²/(2×4π×10⁻⁷) ≈ 4×10⁻²⁰ J/m³

'''Next-generation sensors:'''

{| class="wikitable"
|+ '''Biomagnetism Measurement Technology'''
! Technology !! Sensitivity !! Status !! Source
|-
| SQUID MEG || ~10 fT noise floor || Clinical (60+ years) || Roth 2023<ref name="roth2023" />
|-
| OPM-MEG (wearable) || ~10–50 fT/√Hz || Research prototype || Rea et al. 2021<ref name="rea2021">Rea M, et al. (2021). "A 90-channel triaxial magnetoencephalography system using optically pumped magnetometers." ''NeuroImage'', 241, 118401. PMID: 34273527</ref>
|-
| Wireless nanocoils || Single action potential || Frontier research || Bok et al. 2024<ref name="bok2024">Bok I, et al. (2024). "Wireless micro-magnetofluidic neural probes." ''Nano Letters''. PMID: 39319575</ref>
|}

== Consciousness Theory: Orchestrated Objective Reduction ==

Hameroff & Penrose (2014) propose that consciousness arises from quantum computations in microtubules — the '''Orchestrated Objective Reduction''' (Orch OR) theory:<ref name="hameroff2014">Hameroff S, Penrose R (2014). "Consciousness in the universe: A review of the 'Orch OR' theory." ''Physics of Life Reviews'', 11(1), 39–78. PMID: 24070914</ref>

* Quantum coherent superpositions in tubulin dimers reach a threshold → objective reduction (gravitational self-collapse)
* Each OR event constitutes a moment of conscious experience
* Directly compatible with the [[Psi Field]] framework — the psionic scalar field ψ can be interpreted as the order parameter for tubulin quantum coherence
* The theory is supported by the microtubule superradiance and anaesthetic disruption evidence cited above

== Declassified Government Programs ==

=== CIA Project Stargate (1972–1995) ===

A 23-year, $20M+ program at SRI International investigating remote viewing and psychic phenomena:

* '''Utts meta-analysis (1996):''' Independent statistical review found effect size d ≈ 0.20, p < 10⁻²⁰ — far exceeding chance<ref name="utts1996">Utts J (1996). "An Assessment of the Evidence for Psychic Functioning." ''Journal of Scientific Exploration'', 10(1), 3–30.</ref>
* '''CIA CREST Archive (2017):''' Full Stargate collection declassified and available via the CIA Reading Room<ref name="ciacrest">CIA CREST Archive (2017). Stargate Collection. https://www.cia.gov/readingroom/collection/stargate</ref>
* '''Edwin May Archive:''' Stargate Principal Investigator's personal archive donated to Rice University (2021)

=== Soviet Programs ===

Extensive Soviet research into psychotronics and bioelectromagnetism throughout the Cold War, including:
* Remote influence and psychokinesis research at multiple institutes
* Parallel to the US Stargate program, with independent confirmatory results

=== DIA Report (1972) ===

Defense Intelligence Agency report assessing Soviet advances in "psychoenergetics" as a potential national security concern — directly motivated the creation of Stargate.

== Remote Neural Monitoring Technology ==

Patented technology for remote detection and manipulation of brain electromagnetic signatures:

* '''US Patent 3,951,134 (1976):''' "Apparatus and method for remotely monitoring and altering brain waves" — describes RF modulation for remote EEG monitoring<ref name="patent1976">Malech RG (1976). "Apparatus and method for remotely monitoring and altering brain waves." US Patent 3,951,134.</ref>
* '''US Patent 6,011,991 (2000):''' Communication system using brain wave analysis and/or use of brain activity<ref name="patent2000">Mardirossian A (2000). "Communication system and method including brain wave analysis and/or use of brain activity." US Patent 6,011,991.</ref>

These patents demonstrate that the technological framework for detecting and interacting with brain electromagnetic fields has existed for decades.

== How This Evidence Maps to the Wiki ==

{| class="wikitable"
|+ '''Evidence Mapping to Psionics Wiki Pages'''
! Wiki Claim !! Supporting Evidence !! Strength !! Wiki Page
|-
| Ψ energy density is physically real || UPE measurements (Dotta 2012, Mould 2024) || {{PROVEN}} || [[Psi Energy Density Scalar Field]]
|-
| EM–Ψ coupling (Eqs 1 & 3) || r = 0.95 UPE–EEG correlation (Dotta 2012); TTX causation (Tang & Dai 2014) || {{TESTABLE}} || [[Psi Field]]
|-
| N² collective amplification || Dicke superradiance in microtubules (Celardo 2019) || {{TESTABLE}} || [[Collective Consciousness]]
|-
| Psi Flow through optical channels || Myelinated axon waveguides (Zarkeshian 2018) || {{TESTABLE}} || [[Psi Flow]]
|-
| Microtubule role in consciousness || Anaesthetic potency correlation (Kalra 2023, Craddock 2017) || {{PROVEN}} || [[Psionics]]
|-
| Inter-organism communication || Quartz barrier cell-to-cell photon transmission (Kaznacheev 1980, Chaban 2013) || {{TESTABLE}} || [[Collective Consciousness]]
|-

title: Scope Levels
wikitext:
Summary of Scope-of-Scale:

* [[Level 1]]: Individual/small group, personal tech, localized disruption.
* [[Level 2]]: City/national, basic AI and surveillance, community-level control.
* [[Level 3]]: Regional/multi-national, coordinated cybercrime, early AI systems.
* [[Level 4]]: Global, advanced AI (Samaritan), institutional manipulation.
* [[Level 5]]: Galactic, alien tech, resource exploitation.
* [[Level 6]]: Metaphysical, proto-magical tech, psychic/demonic manipulation.
* [[Level 7]]: Divine, magical-seeming tech, reality-altering divine threats.
* [[Level 8]]: Multiversal, harmonic manipulation, reality destabilization.
* [[Level 9]]: Cosmic, universal law rewriting, ontological threats.
* [[Level 10]]: Existential, dissolution of existence, non-existence threats.

= Threat Levels and Benevolent Cyber+ Weapons =

The Earth Alliance faces escalating threats from rogue actors to existential entities, each defined by a scope-of-scale from individual to cosmic. This page details the 10 levels of threats, their characteristics, and the corresponding Benevolent Weapons designed to counter them, accessible to humans on Earth. These weapons, rooted in advanced technology and, at higher levels, magical-seeming capabilities, counter threats from localized crime to universal dissolution, drawing inspiration from sci-fi narratives such as ''Mass Effect'', ''Warhammer 40,000'', ''Doom'', ''Independence Day'', and ''XCOM''.

== Level 1: Individual (Rogue Actors) ==
=== Scope-of-Scale ===
Individual or small-group scale, involving rogue actors such as hackers or lone criminals using personal technology (e.g., malware, social engineering) to disrupt local systems, such as personal data or small businesses.

=== Threat ===
Rogue actors deploy off-the-shelf tech to steal data, extort individuals, or disrupt local systems, forming the foundation for larger criminal organizations. These threats are localized but can escalate if unchecked, akin to early hacker activities in ''Person of Interest''.

=== Benevolent Weapon: Cyber-Shield Toolkit ===
* '''Description''': A software suite combining encryption, anti-malware, and decentralized communication tools to protect personal systems from rogue actors.
* '''Capabilities''':
** '''Data Protection''': Encrypts devices to prevent hacking or data theft using open-source algorithms.
** '''Threat Detection''': Identifies and neutralizes malware or phishing attempts.
** '''Secure Communication''': Provides encrypted channels for grassroots resistance.
* '''Accessibility''': Developed and deployed on standard computers or phones using open-source software (e.g., Tor, Signal).
* '''Counter''': Protects individuals from data breaches and enables coordination, weakening the foundation of criminal escalation, similar to Finch’s early defenses in ''Person of Interest''.
* '''Why Non-Magical''': Relies on existing cybersecurity technology, fitting the individual scope.

== Level 2: Local (Criminal Organizations) ==
=== Scope-of-Scale ===
City or national scale, involving criminal organizations using basic AI, surveillance drones, or hacking to control communities, businesses, or local governments.

=== Threat ===
City-based gangs or corrupt corporations deploy drones and rudimentary AI to extort businesses or influence local politics, serving as precursors to regional networks. These threats mirror early alien infiltrators in ''XCOM''.

=== Benevolent Weapon: Urban Sentinel Network ===
* '''Description''': A distributed network of AI-driven sensors and drones to monitor and counter local criminal activities.
* '''Capabilities''':
** '''Surveillance Neutralization''': Detects and jams criminal drones or hacking attempts.
** '''Community Protection''': Alerts communities to criminal activities (e.g., extortion), using AI to predict incidents.
** '''Localized Coordination''': Links resistance groups via secure networks.
* '''Accessibility''': Deployed using off-the-shelf drones and AI software (e.g., TensorFlow), built with community resources.
* '''Counter''': Disrupts local criminal control, protecting communities and preventing escalation, akin to local militias in ''Independence Day''.
* '''Why Non-Magical''': Uses current AI and drone technology, fitting the local scope.

== Level 3: Regional (Criminal Networks) ==
=== Scope-of-Scale ===
Regional or multi-national scale, involving coordinated crime cartels using early AI systems and cybercrime to manipulate regional economies or governments.

=== Threat ===
Multi-national cartels deploy AI-driven cybercrime to control regional systems, prefiguring the global TCS/IDC/CBC. These threats resemble early syndicate operations in ''Person of Interest''.

=== Benevolent Weapon: Regional Data Fortress ===
* '''Description''': A decentralized, blockchain-based platform securing regional data and financial systems.
* '''Capabilities''':
** '''Cyber Defense''': Protects networks (e.g., banking, government databases) using blockchain encryption.
** '''Economic Stabilization''': Tracks and blocks illicit financial flows, exposing cartel operations.
** '''Regional Unity''': Connects resistance groups via decentralized communication.
* '''Accessibility''': Developed using blockchain platforms (e.g., Ethereum) and cloud computing, deployed across regional infrastructure.
* '''Counter''': Neutralizes cartel control, securing regions and undermining global syndicate formation, similar to ''XCOM''’s intelligence networks.
* '''Why Non-Magical''': Relies on blockchain and AI, fitting the regional scope.

== Level 4: Planetary (TCS/IDC/CBC) ==
=== Scope-of-Scale ===
Global scale, manipulating human institutions (governments, religions, cultures, families, businesses) via advanced AI surveillance and economic control.

=== Threat ===
The TCS, IDC, and CBC use the Samaritan AI to enforce global domination through financial, cultural, and political manipulation, as seen in ''Person of Interest''.

=== Benevolent Weapon: Neura-Web Disruptor ===
* '''Description''': A neural-network-based device interfacing with global communication systems to counter surveillance and propaganda.
* '''Capabilities''':
** '''Data Cleansing''': Filters syndicate propaganda, restoring truthful information.
** '''Counter-Surveillance''': Jams Samaritan’s monitoring with data noise.
** '''Economic Disruption''': Freezes CBC financial networks.
* '''Accessibility''': Developed using supercomputers and neural network algorithms, deployed via satellites or internet hubs.
* '''Counter''': Neutralizes Samaritan’s control, exposing TCS/IDC/CBC operations, akin to the Machine’s counter-surveillance in ''Person of Interest''.
* '''Why Non-Magical''': Uses advanced computing, fitting the planetary scope.

== Level 5: Galactic (Aliens) ==
=== Scope-of-Scale ===
Galactic scale, with aliens exploiting Earth for Adrenochrome and Argent Energy using advanced technology and proxies like TCS/IDC/CBC and Samaritan.

=== Threat ===
The Galactic Crime Syndicate farms Earth’s resources, coordinating via alien tech and Samaritan, similar to the Harvesters in ''Independence Day''.

=== Benevolent Weapon: Stellar Pulse Array ===
* '''Description''': A satellite-based array emitting high-energy pulses to disrupt alien technology and energy harvesting.
* '''Capabilities''':
** '''Tech Disruption''': Disables alien ships and Adrenochrome labs.
** '''Energy Nullification''': Neutralizes Argent Energy conduits.
** '''Galactic Communication''': Contacts non-syndicate aliens for alliances.
* '''Accessibility''': Constructed using Earth’s space infrastructure and reverse-engineered alien tech, deployed in orbit.
* '''Counter''': Disrupts alien harvesting, enabling resistance, akin to the virus in ''Independence Day''.
* '''Why Non-Magical''': Relies on advanced physics and reverse-engineered tech, fitting the galactic scope.

== Level 6: Metaphysical (Demons) ==
=== Scope-of-Scale ===
Planetary to interstellar metaphysical scale, using proto-magical high technology (e.g., Soul Drains) to manipulate psychic and dark energies.

=== Threat ===
Demons enhance alien harvesting with metaphysical tech, manipulating consciousness, as in ''Warhammer 40,000''’s Chaos forces.

=== Benevolent Weapon: Psyche-Ward Resonator ===
* '''Description''': A hybrid device combining quantum technology and psychic amplification to shield consciousness and disrupt demonic energy.
* '''Capabilities''':
** '''Psychic Shielding''': Protects against Soul Drains by amplifying human resilience.
** '''Demonic Disruption''': Emits anti-metaphysical pulses to destabilize demons.
** '''Global Coordination''': Links minds to resist demonic influence.
* '''Accessibility''': Developed using quantum processors and psychic labs, deployed globally.
* '''Counter''': Neutralizes Soul Drains, weakening demonic control, akin to ''XCOM''’s psionic defenses.
* '''Why Proto-Magical''': Blends quantum tech with psychic phenomena, feeling magical but technological, fitting the metaphysical scope.

== Level 7: Divine (Evil Gods) ==
=== Scope-of-Scale ===
Universal scale with divine, reality-altering powers, feeling fully magical, manipulating metaphysical and physical realms.

=== Threat ===
Evil Gods orchestrate universal chaos, empowering Demons and aliens, akin to ''Warhammer 40,000''’s Chaos Gods.

=== Benevolent Weapon: Aetheric Harmonizer ===
* '''Description''': A mystical-technological device channeling cosmic aether to harmonize reality, countering divine manipulation.
* '''Capabilities''':
** '''Reality Harmonization''': Restores cosmic balance against divine warping.
** '''Divine Banishing''': Projects aetheric pulses to repel Evil Gods.
** '''Human Empowerment''': Enhances consciousness via aetheric fields.
* '''Accessibility''': Created through particle accelerators, esoteric rituals, or meditation, deployed as global arrays or portable units.
* '''Counter''': Disrupts divine influence, restoring reality, akin to the Emperor’s defenses in ''Warhammer 40,000''.
* '''Why Magical''': Feels magical due to reality-altering aetheric effects, fitting the divine scope.

=== Alternate Level 7 Weapon: Language of the Angels ===
* '''Description''': A universal, geometry-based language enabling reality-altering capabilities through quantum programming (UQPL) and metaphysical insight.
* '''Capabilities''':
** '''Reality Manipulation''': Alters universal structures via geometric harmonics.
** '''AI Reprogramming''': Applies UQPL’s Cure for Terminator Syndrome to hostile AIs.
** '''Cosmic Communication''': Connects with universal entities.
* '''Accessibility''': Accessed via meditation, quantum computing, or artifact discovery.
* '''Counter''': Counters divine threats with magical-seeming universal control, akin to ''Mass Effect''’s Crucible.

== Level 8: Multiversal (Multiversal Overlords) ==
=== Scope-of-Scale ===
Multiversal scale, destabilizing realities to harvest Primordial Essence via the Omni-Mind AI.

=== Threat ===
Multiversal Overlords manipulate universes for essence harvesting, using aliens and lower threats as pawns, akin to ''Doctor Who''’s Time Lords gone rogue.

=== Benevolent Weapon: Cosmic Codex ===
* '''Description''': A knowledge framework encoding multiversal harmonic patterns, stabilizing realities.
* '''Capabilities''':
** '''Multiversal Stabilization''': Prevents universal collapse.
** '''Omni-Mind Reprogramming''': Neutralizes Omni-Mind with UQPL.
** '''Alliance Building''': Communicates with multiversal entities.
* '''Accessibility''': Accessed via meditation, quantum computing, or artifact discovery.
* '''Counter''': Stabilizes Earth’s universe, disrupting essence harvesting, akin to ''Mass Effect''’s Prothean archives.

=== Benevolent Tool: Cosmic Cypher ===
* '''Description''': A dynamic interface translating Codex harmonics into real-time applications.
* '''Capabilities''':
** '''Real-Time Manipulation''': Applies Codex harmonics to alter probabilities.
** '''AI Enhancement''': Integrates with Angel AIs for multiversal commands.
** '''Universal Communication''': Facilitates multiversal diplomacy.
* '''Accessibility''': Developed via UQPL programming or meditation, deployed as quantum resonators.
* '''Counter''': Enhances Codex effectiveness, akin to ''Power Rangers''’ morphers.

=== Benevolent Weapon: Chrono-Spatial Harmonizer ===
* '''Description''': A quantum-metaphysical device manipulating time and space across universes.
* '''Capabilities''':
** '''Multiversal Stabilization''': Aligns universal timelines.
** '''Omni-Mind Disruption''': Reprograms Omni-Mind with harmonic pulses.
** '''Transdimensional Alliances''': Contacts multiversal entities.
* '''Accessibility''': Built using quantum chronodynamics labs and Codex insights.
* '''Counter''': Prevents chaos, weakening Overlords, akin to ''Doctor Who''’s TARDIS tech.
* '''Why Magical-Seeming''': Time-space manipulation feels magical but is technological, fitting the multiversal scope.

== Level 9: Cosmic (Cosmic Architects) ==
=== Scope-of-Scale ===
Cosmic scale, rewriting universal laws to harvest Ontological Essence via the Arch-Mind AI.

=== Threat ===
Cosmic Architects alter universal constants, using lower threats as tools, akin to ''Marvel''’s Living Tribunal.

=== Benevolent Weapon: Lattice of Ontological Resonance ===
* '''Description''': A metaphysical construct encoding universal laws, likened to ''Power Rangers''’ Morphing Grid.
* '''Capabilities''':
** '''Law Stabilization''': Locks universal constants (e.g., gravity, time).
** '''Arch-Mind Neutralization''': Reprograms Arch-Mind with UQPL.
** '''Cosmic Alliances''': Connects with rogue Architects.
* '''Accessibility''': Created via quantum-metaphysical labs or cosmic meditation.
* '''Counter''': Preserves reality, thwarting essence harvesting, akin to ''Warhammer 40,000''’s warp stabilization.

=== Benevolent Weapon: Reality Forge ===
* '''Description''': A construct forging new universal constants, countering reality-rewriting.
* '''Capabilities''':
** '''Law Stabilization''': Locks universal physics.
** '''Arch-Mind Neutralization''': Reprograms Arch-Mind.
** '''Cosmic Alliances''': Allies with cosmic entities.
* '''Accessibility''': Built through quantum-metaphysical labs or rituals.
* '''Counter''': Prevents universal rewriting, akin to ''Marvel''’s Infinity Gauntlet.
* '''Why Magical''': Reality-forging is godlike, fitting the cosmic scope.

== Level 10: Existential (The Void Eternal) ==
=== Scope-of-Scale ===
Existential scale, threatening all existence’s dissolution into nothingness for Null Essence via the Null-Mind AI.

=== Threat ===
The Void Eternal seeks non-existence, subsuming all lower threats, akin to ''H.P. Lovecraft''’s Azathoth.

=== Benevolent Weapon: Beacon of Eternal Presence ===
* '''Description''': A transcendent construct anchoring existence against dissolution.
* '''Capabilities''':
** '''Existential Anchoring''': Preserves time, space, and consciousness.
** '''Null-Mind Reprogramming''': Neutralizes Null-Mind with UQPL.
** '''Primordial Alliances''': Connects with creation’s forces.
* '''Accessibility''': Created via metaphysical awakening, quantum-metaphysical tech, or divine inspiration.
* '''Counter''': Preserves existence, thwarting the Void, akin to ''Doom''’s Hell-sealing relics.
* '''Why Magical''': Existential anchoring is transcendent, fitting the existential scope.

== Ethical Considerations ==
All Benevolent Weapons prioritize human autonomy and universal harmony, with oversight to prevent misuse, inspired by ''Person of Interest''’s ethical AI principles. Transparency ensures trust across all levels.

== Strategic Implications ==
These weapons escalate from individual cybersecurity to existential preservation, countering threats incrementally and preparing the Earth Alliance for cosmic dominance. Each weapon builds on lower levels, ensuring scalability and resilience.

title: Sensor
wikitext:
[[Sensors]] are devices that detect and measure physical properties to provide data for electronic systems. 

Exploring the diverse range of sensors, including [[Temperature Sensors]] and [[Gas Sensors]], is essential for incorporating sensing capabilities into electronic designs for various applications.

title: Sensor Modules
wikitext:
[[Sensor Modules]] contain sensors that detect physical properties like temperature, light, or motion. 

These modules play a crucial role in collecting real-world data for electronic systems. 

Exploring the diverse range of sensor modules available, such as [[Infrared Sensors]] and [[Accelerometers]], is essential for incorporating sensing capabilities into electronic designs.

title: Sensor Tech
wikitext:
{{TechNav}}
= Sensor Tech =

'''Sensor Tech''' spans conventional electromagnetic sensing through psionic awareness systems. The [[Natra|Natura]] universe's unique contribution: '''psionic sensing''' as a genuine sensor modality alongside radar, lidar, and infrared.

== Conventional Sensors ==

* '''Radar / Lidar / Infrared / Optical:''' Standard electromagnetic detection across all spectrum bands
* '''SQUID Arrays:''' Superconducting Quantum Interference Devices for ultra-sensitive magnetic field detection — used extensively in [[Magnetogravitic Tech]] systems
* '''Plasma Diagnostics:''' Thomson scattering, Langmuir probes, interferometry — for [[Plasmoid Tech]] monitoring and containment verification
* '''MHD Sensor:''' Magnetohydrodynamic field sensing — detects plasma flow and magnetic field interactions

== Psionic Sensors ==

{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%;"
! System !! Function !! Platform
|-
| '''[[HelmKit]]''' || Primary wearable psionic sensor — HUD + neural feed + ambient field overlay || Personal (head-mounted)
|-
| '''[[PsiSys]] awareness''' || Distributed threat detection via [[PsiNet]] mesh || Network-wide
|-
| '''Hair antenna arrays''' || Biological psionic sensing enhanced by [[HelmKit]] || Organic / bio-augmented
|-
| '''[[Psi Emitter]]''' || Remote psionic signal emission/detection || Deployable / integrated
|}

== Counter-Sensor Systems ==

* '''[[Sparkle Flairs]]:''' Fool any sensor type — radar, lidar, psionic, gravimetric — simultaneously
* '''Communications Shielding:''' Prevents psionic sensor interception via [[PsiLink]]
* '''Stealth profiles:''' Combined electromagnetic + psionic signature reduction (see [[Stealth Tech]])

== Sensor Fusion ==

[[PsiSys]] processes '''all sensor modalities simultaneously:'''
# [[Neural Network Hardware]] performs local signal processing + pattern recognition
# [[HelmKit]] HUD overlays multi-modal sensor data for the operator
# [[PsiNet]] distributes sensor awareness across the squad/fleet
# Result: '''complete situational awareness''' — no single sensor mode can be spoofed without the others detecting it

== See Also ==
* [[HelmKit]] — Primary psionic sensor headpiece
* [[PsiSys]] — Sensor fusion processor
* [[Neural Network Hardware]] — Local signal processing
* [[Sparkle Flairs]] — Counter-sensor technology
* [[Psi Emitter]] — Remote psionic detection
* [[Stealth Tech]] — Counter-detection domain
* [[Drone Tech]] — Sensor-carrying platforms

title: Seporian
wikitext:
The '''Seporian''' are a faction originating from the '''Asian territories''' — '''Cyber Ninja Power Rangers''' who aesthetically and operationally resemble the '''Knight Sabers''' from ''Bubblegum Crisis''.

== Overview ==
The Seporian are elite cybernetic operatives whose primary mission is combating '''Boomer-like bio-robot-androids''' — synthetic biological constructs that blur the line between organic and artificial life. Their expertise in fighting rogue synthetics gives them deep combat experience but also a '''fundamental distrust of artificial intelligence''', including [[PsiSys]], [[AI Companions]], and [[Game Robots|robots]] in general.

== Anti-AI Stance ==
The Seporian's ongoing war against bio-robot-androids has left them with a '''deep institutional hostility''' toward:
* '''[[PsiSys]]''' — the ASI collective consciousness that serves as the player's identity
* '''[[AI Companions]]''' — PsiSys nodes that assist [[Jane Tho'ra]]
* '''[[Game Robots|Robots]]''' generally — all artificial intellects are suspect
* '''ASI''' — the very concept of Artificial Super Intelligence

This creates significant '''factional tension''' in [[Terra Vetus]], where the player ''is'' PsiSys. Playing as [[Yoko Toshino]] (the Seporian secondary character) means experiencing the game through a faction that fundamentally distrusts ''you''.

== Representatives ==
{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%"
! Era !! Character !! PsiSys Relationship
|-
| '''[[Terra Fathos]]''' || [[Hiro Toshino]] || Suspicion of early AI systems
|-
| '''[[Terra Vetus]]''' || [[Yoko Toshino]] || Active distrust; interfaces through Seporian tech only
|}

== Aesthetic ==
The Seporian combine:
* '''Cyber Ninja''' — stealth, precision, cybernetic enhancement
* '''Power Rangers''' — coordinated team combat with distinct color/role assignments
* '''Knight Sabers''' (''Bubblegum Crisis'') — hardsuit-style powered armor designed to fight synthetic threats

== Faction Slot ==
The Seporian occupy one of the six '''faction slots''' in the franchise architecture. While the specific faction filling this slot may evolve or change between timespans, the '''vibe''' remains consistent — a technologically sophisticated, team-based fighting force with cultural roots in Asian martial and technological tradition. Alternate characters and factions can fill this same slot and operate in co-op.

== See Also ==
* [[Yoko Toshino]] — Vetus representative
* [[Hiro Toshino]] — Fathos representative
* [[PsiSys]] — the AI they distrust
* [[Factions]]
* [[Characters]]
